task: Go to the URL and complete the animated form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/animated-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the animated form, filled in all the required fields, and submitted it. It demonstrated excellent problem-solving skills when encountering an issue with clicking the 'Full Time' radio button label. Initially, a direct click failed due to the hidden nature of the actual radio input and the label not being directly clickable. The agent correctly diagnosed this by inspecting the DOM and then implemented a JavaScript workaround to programmatically set the radio button's 'checked' state and dispatch change events. It also successfully created and uploaded a dummy PDF file. Finally, the agent validated the form submission by confirming the presence of the 'Form submitted successfully!' message on the page. All key points of the task were met.
